envVars.name: HIRO_API_KEY
envVars.description: Hiro API key for Bitcoin Ordinals data (optional, increases rate limits)

envVars.name: ORDISCAN_API_KEY
envVars.description: Ordiscan API key for fallback data source

envVars.name: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Solana wallet private key for sending mail payments

envVars.name: LOB_API_KEY
envVars.description: Lob.com API key for printing and mailing physical letters

envVars.name: SOLMAIL_MODE
envVars.description: Operating mode: 'demo' (testnet + Lob test) or 'production' (mainnet + real mail)

envVars.name: PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Wallet private key for transaction signing
